channel.title: yourfdc.au News — Family Day Care Australia
channel.description: Australia's dedicated Family Day Care news hub.

item.title: Family day care provider suspended following serious compliance failures
item.description: The Victorian Early Childhood Regulatory Authority (VECRA) has immediately suspended the service approval of Gabow Family Day Care Pty Ltd for 90 days after identifying extensive compliance failures that posed an immediate risk to children’s safety.
item.content:encoded: The Victorian Early Childhood Regulatory Authority (VECRA) has immediately suspended the service approval of Gabow Family Day Care Pty Ltd for 90 days after identifying extensive compliance failures that posed an immediate risk to children’s safety.
item.dc:creator: The Sector

item.title: NSW Annual Preschool Census: what services need to know for 2026
item.description: Community and mobile preschools across New South Wales are encouraged to prepare for the 2026 Annual Preschool Census, with the data collection continuing to inform funding, planning and policy decisions across the early childhood education sector.
item.content:encoded: Community and mobile preschools across New South Wales are encouraged to prepare for the 2026 Annual Preschool Census, with the data collection continuing to inform funding, planning and policy decisions across the early childhood education sector.
item.dc:creator: The Sector

item.title: Queensland shares teaching and learning resources to support early childhood educators
item.description: Early childhood educators and service leaders can access a range of teaching and learning resources designed to support curriculum planning, reflective practice and quality improvement.
item.content:encoded: Early childhood educators and service leaders can access a range of teaching and learning resources designed to support curriculum planning, reflective practice and quality improvement.
item.dc:creator: The Sector

item.title: Embedding child safety into staff onboarding and induction
item.description: A strong child safe culture begins before a new educator enters an early childhood education and care (ECEC) service, with recruitment, onboarding and induction playing a critical role in setting expectations and supporting safe practice from the first day of employment.
item.content:encoded: A strong child safe culture begins before a new educator enters an early childhood education and care (ECEC) service, with recruitment, onboarding and induction playing a critical role in setting expectations and supporting safe practice from the first day of employment.
item.dc:creator: The Sector

item.title: NSW immunisation requirements: what ECEC services need to know for enrolment
item.description: Approved providers and early childhood education and care (ECEC) services are reminded of their responsibilities when enrolling children under New South Wales immunisation requirements.
item.content:encoded: Approved providers and early childhood education and care (ECEC) services are reminded of their responsibilities when enrolling children under New South Wales immunisation requirements.
item.dc:creator: The Sector

item.title: Former Sydney childcare worker Hamish Tait charged with hundreds of abuse offences as police release full list of centres - 7news.com.au
item.description: Former Sydney childcare worker Hamish Tait charged with hundreds of abuse offences as police release full list of centres - 7news.com.au
item.content:encoded: Former Sydney childcare worker Hamish Tait charged with hundreds of abuse offences as police release full list of centres - 7news.com.au
item.dc:creator: 7news.com.au

item.title: G8 Education faces Federal Court action over more than $2 million in alleged underpayments
item.description: Australia’s largest for-profit early learning operator, G8 Education Limited, is facing Federal Court proceedings after the Fair Work Ombudsman alleged underpayments and compensation claims totalling more than $2 million for more than 1,400 workers.
item.content:encoded: Australia’s largest for-profit early learning operator, G8 Education Limited, is facing Federal Court proceedings after the Fair Work Ombudsman alleged underpayments and compensation claims totalling more than $2 million for more than 1,400 workers.
item.dc:creator: The Sector

item.title: Everyone experiences loss and grief – but that doesn’t make it any easier to talk with kids about it
item.description: Parents and educators sometimes avoid having conversations about grief with children because they don’t know what to say. Here are some tips for how to approach it.
item.content:encoded: Parents and educators sometimes avoid having conversations about grief with children because they don’t know what to say. Here are some tips for how to approach it.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation

item.title: The Breadwinner: Comedy doesn’t need flawless dads, but we do need competent ones
item.description: Comedic portrayals of incompetent dads can distort public understanding of fathers’ essential and real-life contributions to children’s development.
item.content:encoded: Comedic portrayals of incompetent dads can distort public understanding of fathers’ essential and real-life contributions to children’s development.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation

item.title: Childcare workers have been guaranteed a pay bump. What’s the fine print?
item.description: The federal government has set aside $3.6 billion over the next two years for early educator pay. But what happens after that is not yet clear.
item.content:encoded: The federal government has set aside $3.6 billion over the next two years for early educator pay. But what happens after that is not yet clear.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation

item.title: Toy Story 5 pits traditional toys vs a tablet. In real life, families can combine the two
item.description: The latest instalment of the film franchise addresses a dilemma many parents face: what happens to playtime when children become obsessed with screens?
item.content:encoded: The latest instalment of the film franchise addresses a dilemma many parents face: what happens to playtime when children become obsessed with screens?
